case_title: MOHAMMED ALMAHBASHI VS. DIEGO SILVA et al

docket_entries.description: OPPOSITION TO MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTEROGATORIES, PRODUCTION DOCUEMENTS; DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SILVA, DIEGO

DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF MOHAMMED ALMAHBASHI'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S FAILURE TO RESPOND WAS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO RESPOND WITHIN 15 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. SANCTIONS ARE AWARDED AGAINST DEFENDANT DIEGO SILVA IN THE AMOUNT OF $315, TO BE PAID WITHIN 30 DAYS OF NOTICE OF THIS ORDER. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-30-2009 Off Calendar

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-03-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc And Mtn To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories; Production Of Docs; Sanctions
Off Calendar May-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Philip Segal, Atty. for Plaintiff and moving party: Mohammed Almahbashi
No other appearances.

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Plaintiff Mohammed Almahbashi's Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, Production Of Documents is granted. Defendant's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Defendant is ordered to respond within 15 days of notice of this order. Sanctions are awarded against Defendant Diego Silva in the amount of $315, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order. Order was signed in open court. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.
